ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sheila Robello, for Michon Coleman, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel reports that a petition is in the queue and it requests an extension of time of six (6) months to administer the estate. There is discussion re the pending surcharge petition and a timeline for when it might be filed.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Nov-12-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Thompson. Not Reported.

***After hearing (May-14-2025): after consideration by the court, the matter is now continued to Jul-15-2025 at 9:00 am in Department 204. Counsel shall be notified of the preceding.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sheila Robello for Michon Coleman, Administrator (via Zoom).

Ms. Robello reported that the administration of the estate is tied to the grandfather's estate, and that the taxes for the grandfather's estate have been completed. She is preparing a surcharge petition regarding actions taken by the former administrator, which is expected to be filed in the next few weeks.

Ms. Robello estimated that the grandfather's estate should be resolved in approximately four months, absent objections. The estate of Ronald D. Coleman should be closed approximately two months thereafter, making for an estimated six to eight months before final distribution.

Ms. Robello requested a 30-day continuance to allow time to prepare a petition in this action to request additional time. The court continued the matter May 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Vincent Yu appeared via zoom for Michon Coleman (administrator).

Mr. Yu stated that the probate referee cannot provide an inventory and appraisal until the Lee Coleman matter has been settled. Status on close of estate is continued to November 01, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by October 24, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.
